body:
Title: Revenu Quebec TP-1.D-V and TP-1.D.GR-V 2025 main income tax return.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D-V%282025-12%29.pdf
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.GR-V%282025-12%29.pdf

TP-1 main-return numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 18571
Value: 0.14
Value: 0.20
Value: 0.10
Value: 53255
Value: 106495
Value: 129590
Value: 0.19
Value: 0.24
Value: 0.2575
Value: 7455.70
Value: 17571.30
Value: 23114.10
Value: 0.06
Value: 1420
Value: 200
Value: 50
Value: 0.85
Value: 0.75
Value: 155
Value: 15000
Value: 30000
Value: 0.5

Revenu Quebec TP-1.D-V 2025 is the prescribed income tax return for the 2025 taxation year. Line 199 adds line 101 and lines 105 through 164 to calculate total income. Line 254 adds lines 201 through 207, 214 through 231, and 234 through 252 to calculate total deductions. Line 256 subtracts line 254 from line 199. Line 275 adds line 256 and line 260 and floors the result at zero to calculate net income. Line 279 adds lines 275 through 278. Line 298 adds lines 287 through 297. Line 299 subtracts line 298 from line 279 and floors the result at zero to calculate taxable income.

For non-refundable credits, TP-1.D-V line 350 gives the basic personal amount as $18,571. Line 359 subtracts line 358 from line 350. Line 377 adds lines 359 through 376. Line 377.1 multiplies line 377 by 14%. Line 388 adds lines 378 through 385, and line 389 multiplies line 388 by 20%. Line 397 multiplies union, professional or other dues by 10%. Line 399 adds line 377.1, lines 389 through 392, lines 395 through 397, line 398, and line 398.1.

TP-1.D.GR-V Work Chart 401 calculates income tax on taxable income. The brackets are $53,255, $106,495, and $129,590. The rates are 14%, 19%, 24%, and 25.75%. The base tax amounts for columns B, C, and D are $7,455.70, $17,571.30, and $23,114.10. TP-1.D-V line 413 subtracts line 406 from line 401. Line 425 adds lines 414 through 424. Line 430 subtracts line 425 from line 413. Line 432 subtracts credits transferred from one spouse to the other and floors the result at zero. Line 450 adds lines 432 through 447. Line 465 adds lines 451.2 through 463. Line 468 adds line 465 and line 466. Line 470 subtracts line 468 from line 450; negative amounts are refunds and positive amounts are balances due. Line 478 calculates the refund after any refund transferred to a spouse.

TP-1.D.GR-V Work Chart 201 calculates the deduction for workers by multiplying eligible work income by 6% and capping the result at $1,420. Work Chart 297 calculates the deduction for copyright income starting from $15,000, subtracting $30,000 from copyright income, multiplying the excess by 0.5, and claiming the lesser of copyright income or the resulting deduction. Work Chart 395 calculates donations and gifts credits using 20%, 25.75%, and 24% tiers. Work Chart 414 calculates the tax credit for contributions to authorized Quebec municipal political parties by applying 85% to the first $50, 75% to the remaining eligible contribution up to a $200 contribution cap, and capping the credit at $155.
